title: Mariko
overview: After Logan saves a man named Tesshin Asano, who was being attacked by members of Advanced Idea Mechanics, he reveals Mariko's whereabouts.

title: Yukio
overview: After Hideki shoots a drug into Logan to slow his healing factor, he awakens in an apartment, where he's tended to by an assassin named Yukio.

title: Kikyo
overview: After a fight with Logan, Kikyo escapes -- and Logan retreats. Meanwhile, Mariko overhears Hideki telling her father that Logan is still alive.

title: Omega Red
overview: Logan's fight with Omega Red -- who left him in a cave to die -- takes a toll on Logan, despite his healing factor.

title: Asano
overview: Logan uses Yukio's ring blade to sever Omega Red's right arm and slices the box on his chest, defeating him.

title: Min
overview: Despite Min's warnings, Logan goes to the island called Dragon Palace. Knowing Wolverine is on the island, Kurohagi sends Vadhaka to take him.

title: Vadhaka
overview: After Vadhaka attacks Logan and Min, she tells Logan the statue belongs to Kurohagi -- but it can't move unless the seal is removed.

title: Koh
overview: When a broadcast of Yukio's location is sent to Koh's base, Logan says he'll save her rather than let her die to get revenge.

title: Hell Road
overview: To reach the Dragon Palace -- where Mariko is getting married -- Logan and Yukio must go through the Hell Road, which has traps set along the way.

title: Shingen
overview: As Logan and Yukio fight their way through Hell Road, the statue of Vadhaka appears before them. Meanwhile, the wedding ceremony is about to begin.

title: Kurohagi
overview: Consumed with hatred and thoughts of revenge, Logan enters the Dragon Palace, followed by Yukio and Koh. Can Logan stop the wedding in time?

title: Logan
overview: Logan engages in his final battle with Shingen at the Dragon Palace. Meanwhile, Kurohagi launches a last-ditch effort to make Mariko his own.
